name: Country Cork Irish Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Leek, white part thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the lamb chops with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a wide saucepan or Dutch oven that can hold all chops in a single layer.
3. Brown the chops on both sides until golden brown.
4. Remove any melted fat from the pan.
5. Add enough water to cover the chops, then bring to a boil.
6. Lower heat and add dried herbs (parsley, bay leaf, peppercorns, thyme, rosemary) tied in cheesecloth.
7. Simmer for about 20 minutes.
8. Peel potatoes and cut into bite-sized rounds.
9. Chop any potato trimmings into small pieces.
10. Add the chopped potatoes, potato trimmings, shredded cabbage, chopped onions, sliced leek, diced celery, and peas to the pot with the chops.
11. Continue simmering for an additional 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
12. Taste and correct seasoning if needed.
13. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.
